# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const DEFAULT_MODULE = Deno.env.get("DEFAULT_MODULE") ?? "";
const ALLOW_QUERY_MODULES =
  (Deno.env.get("ALLOW_QUERY_MODULES") ?? "true").toLowerCase() === "true";
const MODULES_ENV = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES") ?? "";

type ModuleRecord = {
  source: string;
  namespace: Record<string, unknown>;
};

function json(data: unknown, status = 200): Response {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      "cache-control": "no-store",
    },
  });
}

function normalizeModuleList(value: string | null): string[] {
  if (!value) return [];
  return value
    .split(",")
    .map((v) => v.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function getRequestedModules(req: Request): string[] {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const envModules = normalizeModuleList(MODULES_ENV);
  const queryModules = ALLOW_QUERY_MODULES
    ? normalizeModuleList(url.searchParams.get("module"))
    : [];
  const modules = [...envModules, ...queryModules];
  if (modules.length === 0 && DEFAULT_MODULE) modules.push(DEFAULT_MODULE);
  return [...new Set(modules)];
}

async function loadModule(source: string): Promise<ModuleRecord> {
  const namespace = (await import(source)) as Record<string, unknown>;
  return { source, namespace };
}

async function executePluginHook(
  mod: ModuleRecord,
  req: Request,
): Promise<unknown> {
  const candidate = mod.namespace.default ?? mod.namespace.handler ?? mod.namespace.run;
  if (typeof candidate === "function") {
    return await (candidate as (req: Request) => unknown | Promise<unknown>)(req);
  }
  return {
    loaded: true,
    exports: Object.keys(mod.namespace),
  };
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url);

    if (url.pathname === "/health") {
      return json({ ok: true });
    }

    const requestedModules = getRequestedModules(req);

    if (requestedModules.length === 0) {
      return json(
        {
          error: "No modules specified",
          usage: {
            env: {
              PLUGIN_MODULES: "comma,separated,module,paths",
              DEFAULT_MODULE: "fallback/module/path.ts",
              ALLOW_QUERY_MODULES: "true|false",
            },
            query: "?module=https://example.com/plugin.ts,module=./local.ts",
          },
        },
        400,
      );
    }

    const loaded = await Promise.allSettled(
      requestedModules.map((source) => loadModule(source)),
    );

    const successes: ModuleRecord[] = [];
    const failures: Array<{ source: string; error: string }> = [];

    for (let i = 0; i < loaded.length; i++) {
      const result = loaded[i];
      const source = requestedModules[i];
      if (result.status === "fulfilled") {
        successes.push(result.value);
      } else {
        failures.push({
          source,
          error: result.reason instanceof Error
            ? `${result.reason.name}: ${result.reason.message}`
            : String(result.reason),
        });
      }
    }

    const pluginResults = await Promise.all(
      successes.map(async (mod) => {
        try {
          return {
            source: mod.source,
            result: await executePluginHook(mod, req),
          };
        } catch (error) {
          return {
            source: mod.source,
            error: error instanceof Error
              ? `${error.name}: ${error.message}`
              : String(error),
          };
        }
      }),
    );

    return json({
      ok: failures.length === 0,
      requestedModules,
      loaded: successes.map((m) => ({
        source: m.source,
        exports: Object.keys(m.namespace),
      })),
      failures,
      pluginResults,
    }, failures.length > 0 ? 207 : 200);
  } catch (error) {
    return json(
      {
        ok: false,
        error: error instanceof Error
          ? `${error.name}: ${error.message}`
          : String(error),
      },
      500,
    );
  }
});
